user_query: List SmartSales orders, then retrieve the full details of the first order.

plan.query: List SmartSales orders, then retrieve the full details of the first order.
plan.reasoning: To fulfill the user's request, I first need to list the SmartSales orders. Once I have this list, I will take the first order and retrieve its full details, which requires a single call to the SmartSales agent.

steps.task: Retrieve full details of the first SmartSales order from the list obtained in step 1 (if any). If no orders are found, note that and skip the details retrieval.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results of step 1 and step 2. If details of the first order were retrieved successfully, present them along with the list of orders; otherwise, indicate that no orders were found.
